biography: Claudia Jennings, born Mary Eileen Chesterton (20 December 1949 - 3 October 1979), was an American model, stage and screen actress. She was Playboy magazine's Playmate of the Month for November 1969 and also Playmate of the Year for 1970. Jennings subsequently pursued a career in acting, and was known as the "Queen of B movies". She died in an automobile accident at the age of 29.
name: Claudia Jennings
